items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a significant advantage in the clinch over Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I think Benois is going to have a big advantage in the clinch

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis possesses superior judo skills compared to Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I think Benois's judo is probably even better.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is coming off a fight where he sustained significant damage.
items.quote: Pimblet's coming off of a fight where he took a lot of damage against Justin Gage.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis is slower than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: I could see him KOing Benois Staint Denise because Benois is slow.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has high-level jiu-jitsu and ground-and-pound skills.
items.quote: Pimblet's got really good jiu-jitsu. He's got good ground and pound.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's durability has decreased with each subsequent fight.
items.quote: they've been from fight to fight decreasingly durable. McGregor has been getting less durable from fight to fight.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not fought in five years.
items.quote: it's been five years since his last fight.

items.claim: Max Holloway's defensive striking has improved over the course of his career.
items.quote: Holloway, his defense has gotten better over the years

items.claim: Conor McGregor lacks comfort in the octagon due to his inactivity.
items.quote: he doesn't feel comfortable in the octagon at all anymore.
